actions.name: Breath of God
actions.description:
On using this attack, the user becomes @Affliction[bound] until the beginning of their next activation. While the user is @Affliction[bound], they emit a 3m radius Aura. This aura applies @UUID[Compendium.ptr2e.core-effects.z7BfyuquHkly9OfK]{Protected} to the user and all allies within the aura.

Enemies are displaced to the first viable space outside of the aura. In the event that this @Trait[shield] is hit with a @Trait[pierce] attack, the aura collapses, @UUID[Compendium.ptr2e.core-effects.z7BfyuquHkly9OfK]{Protected} is cleansed from all targets, and the User is cured of @Affliction[bound].
